Name: Run Azure DevOps Build Pipeline
Description: Will trigger a build pipeline in Azure DevOps for a specified branch using the [Azure DevOps REST API](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/azure/devops/?view=azure-devops-rest-6.1).
Author: adamoctoclose

Parameters.Name: AzureDevOpsAccessKey
Parameters.Label: Azure DevOps Access Key
Parameters.HelpText: A [personal access token (PAT)](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/organizations/accounts/use-personal-access-tokens-to-authenticate?view=azure-devops&tabs=preview-page) is used as an alternate password to authenticate into Azure DevOps. Learn how to create, use, modify, and revoke PATs for Azure DevOps.

Parameters.Name: AzureDevOpsOrganizationName
Parameters.Label: Azure DevOps Organization Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the Azure DevOps [organization](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/organizations/accounts/organization-management?view=azure-devops).

Parameters.Name: AzureDevOpsPipelineName
Parameters.Label: Azure DevOps Pipeline Name
Parameters.HelpText:
The name of the pipeline you want to run in your Azure DevOps project

Example: helloword-ci

Parameters.Name: AzureDevOpsWaitUntilCompletion
Parameters.Label: Azure DevOps Wait Until Completion
Parameters.HelpText: Wait for the pipeline to finish. If selected then the step will wait until the build pipeline is completed before finishing the step. If the build pipeline fails then the step will also fail.

Parameters.Name: AzureDevOpsVariables
Parameters.Label: AzureDevOpsVariables
Parameters.HelpText: Azure DevOps pipeline variables should be passed in as JSON. Example... "TestEnv": {"isSecret": false,"value": "true"},"ProdEnv": {"isSecret": false,"value": "false"}
